T0038.title: Premium Card For Masses
T0038.definition: 卡圈黑话，指交通银行白麒麟、招商银行经典白、浦发AE白这三张权益丰厚但可通过积分抵扣年费的高端信用卡。
T0038.description: These three cards are jokingly called the ‘loser’s three whites’ by ordinary cardholders because their application thresholds are relatively accessible while their perks are substantial. In underground fraud, intermediaries exploit bank approval windows or profile fabrication techniques to help underqualified clients obtain these high-end cards, aiming to defraud high credit lines or resell the rewards points.
T0038.usageExample: SPDB AE Platinum is loosening up lately. Agents say it’s the best value among the loser’s three whites and they can package my profile to get it approved.
